programs.title: Curse Of Oak Island
programs.desc: Faced with the threat of a shut down in the swamp, the team focuses their energy on the Money Pit and are euphoric when they find more gold, with evidence suggesting it's of Spanish origin.

programs.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programs.desc: A couple who’ve kept native tussock on their Southland farm believe making a profit and protecting the environment go naturally together.

programs.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programs.desc: A family enjoy the surf and natural beauty of a Northland farm and coastal park.

programs.title: Trucking Hell
programs.desc: It's 4.30am and as Britain's network of roads and motorway stir the team as Lantern gear up for a huge emergency call out; an 18-wheel trailer carrying two portacabins has caught fire.

programs.title: American Pickers
programs.desc: In the heart of beer country, the Wolfe brothers find the mother lode of breweriana, the granddaddy of all pinball machines, and Elvis inside a Milwaukee collector's suburban home.

programs.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programs.sub_title: Do You Hear What I Hear?
programs.desc: Jessica threatens to cut the neighbourhood carolling this year due to last year's bad performance; Marvin becomes suspicious of Honey when she goes to a movie without him.
